title: How Can I Delete My USCIS Online Account? | USCIS
content:
## How Can I Delete My USCIS Online Account?
There are three types of accounts in myUSCIS:
- Applicant, Petitioner or Requestor account is for people submitting forms on their own without a legal representative;
- Legal representative account is for attorneys and accredited representatives; and
- H-1B Registrant account is to register for the H-1B random selection process.
If you have selected the incorrect account type and have not submitted an online form to USCIS using the account' you may delete your account and start a new one.
Drafts of forms and registrations must be deleted to successfully delete the account.
PLEASE NOTE: A Legal Representative’s account cannot be deleted if their profile has been fully completed.
Follow these steps to delete your USCIS online account:
Log into your USCIS online account at myaccount.uscis.gov Once logged in, click on the My Account menu. Select Settings from the dropdown menu.
- Log into your USCIS online account at myaccount.uscis.gov
- Once logged in, click on the My Account menu.
- Select Settings from the dropdown menu.
On the Account Settings page, select View all settings or delete this account link. Note: You can use either the View all settings or delete this account link – both will take you to the Edit Account page.
- On the Account Settings page, select View all settings or delete this account link.
Note: You can use either the View all settings or delete this account link – both will take you to the Edit Account page.
On the Edit Account page, click on Delete Your Account button.
- On the Edit Account page, click on Delete Your Account button.
On the Verify Your Account page, enter your USCIS online account password , and click Submit .
- On the Verify Your Account page, enter your USCIS online account password , and click Submit .
On the Verification Code page, enter the verification code we sent to your preferred two-factor verification method, then click Submit .
- On the Verification Code page, enter the verification code we sent to your preferred two-factor verification method, then click Submit .
Once we have confirmed your verification code, type the word DELETE in uppercase letters in the confirmation box of the Delete Account page, then click Delete Account button.
- Once we have confirmed your verification code, type the word DELETE in uppercase letters in the confirmation box of the Delete Account page, then click Delete Account button.
You will then see a confirmation message informing you that Your Account was Successfully Deleted .
- You will then see a confirmation message informing you that Your Account was Successfully Deleted .
